engineMockDesc: Generates dream interpretations instantly using the built-in dream dictionary without network requests or downloading files. Ideal for offline use or low-spec devices.
engineChromeDesc: Uses the Gemini Nano model built into Chrome to perform high-quality, free-form dream interpretation completely offline. Initial run might require a 1~3GB model download.
engineQwenDesc: Uses WebGPU and WebLLM to download and run a 300MB ultra-lightweight Qwen2.5 model directly in the browser. Offers fully isolated, secure on-device analysis.
gpuNotSupported: This browser/device does not support WebGPU.
downloadNeeded: Requires a one-time download of approximately 300MB on first run.
portalSubtitle: What traces of consciousness remain from your sleep tonight?
inputPlaceholder: Describe the fragments of your dream freely... flying in the sky, wandering in a dark room, meeting someone, etc.
shortcutTip: Press Ctrl + Enter to interpret instantly
minCharAlert: Please describe your dream in a bit more detail (at least 5 characters).
tuningEnergy: Aligning the energies of your subconscious...
tarotHelp: Tap the card to reveal the vision of your dream
chatInputPlaceholder: Ask the AI follow-up questions about the hidden meaning or tarot advice...
aiResponseSuccess: Decoded the vision map from the depths of your dream.
aiChatError: The portal connection faded while conversing with your subconscious. Please ask again in a moment.
aiChatMockTarot: The tarot card presented in your dream is an indicator of where your heart points. The message it conveys is not a coincidence, but represents inner conviction regarding your choices.
aiChatMockSymbol: Singularities or places appearing in your dream are intersections of ancient wisdom and modern longings. The query you asked reveals a subconscious desire to break boundaries and create new potential.
aiChatMockDefault: The question you asked raises mystical ripples beneath the surface of your subconscious. This symbol might represent potential you did not realize in reality; we recommend focusing more on your inner voice.
guideIntro: DreamTeller is a fully on-device service where your browser runs the AI models locally without sending any data to servers. Follow the instructions below to complete setup.
step1Desc: Enter the addresses below into your address bar, enable the settings, and restart your browser.
step2Desc: After enabling the flags, Chrome needs to download the language model (Gemini Nano, ~1-3GB). Click the button below to trigger the download session.
step2ManualDesc: If the auto-download does not start immediately, you can check the status on the Chrome components page.
componentPageGuide: Find "Optimization Guide On Device Model" in the list and click [Check for update] to finish downloading.
modelWaiting: Initializing engine and waiting for model download...
modelDownloadConfirm:
Would you like to download the local AI model (approx. 300MB)?

This is a one-time download, after which dreams will be interpreted directly inside your browser without any network connection.
modelDownloadFail: Error during local AI model download:
confirmClearLogs: Are you sure you want to clear all system logs?
